'''zhafoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olalliberry|olalliberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olalliberry|olalliberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhafoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfeseth|zhæfeseth]] || [[word:zhæfesej|zhæfesej]] || [[word:zhæfesesh|zhæfesesh]] || [[word:zhæfese|zhæfese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafofosoth|zhafofosoth]] || [[word:zhafofosoj|zhafofosoj]] || [[word:zhafofososh|zhafofososh]] || [[word:zhafofoso|zhafofoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafosoth|zhafosoth]] || [[word:zhafosoj|zhafosoj]] || [[word:zhafososh|zhafososh]] || [[word:zhafoso|zhafoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafofsoth|zhafofsoth]] || [[word:zhafofsoj|zhafofsoj]] || [[word:zhafofsosh|zhafofsosh]] || [[word:zhafofsof|zhafofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafosotho|zhafosotho]] || [[word:zhafosojo|zhafosojo]] || [[word:zhafososho|zhafososho]] || [[word:zhafosoko|zhafosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafosoth|zhafosoth]] || [[word:zhafosoj|zhafosoj]] || [[word:zhafososh|zhafososh]] || [[word:zhafoso|zhafoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafosothol|zhafosothol]] || [[word:zhafosojol|zhafosojol]] || [[word:zhafososhol|zhafososhol]] || [[word:zhafosokol|zhafosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafosothotho|zhafosothotho]] || [[word:zhafosojojo|zhafosojojo]] || [[word:zhafososhosho|zhafososhosho]] || [[word:zhafosoko|zhafosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafosothon|zhafosothon]] || [[word:zhafosojon|zhafosojon]] || [[word:zhafososhon|zhafososhon]] || [[word:zhafosokon|zhafosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafosothoro|zhafosothoro]] || [[word:zhafosojoro|zhafosojoro]] || [[word:zhafososhoro|zhafososhoro]] || [[word:zhafosokoro|zhafosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
